caption: A man with long dark hair tied back and wearing glasses performs in front of a backdrop of horizontal wooden slats. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt under a dark vest featuring blue embroidery and a red decorative pattern along the bottom front. He stands before a microphone on a stand and is captured mid-song with his mouth open. In the foreground, the back of the heads of several audience members are visible. To the right of the performer, the word "ORCA" appears in white capital letters on a dark rectangular background. Across the sequence of frames, the man's facial expression and mouth position shift slightly as he sings, and his body sways minimally, while the overall composition of the scene, the equipment, and the onlookers remain stationary.
